Dadi ki Parampara

DadiAmrit ki kahani shuru hui ek dadi ki rasoi se — generations se Ayurvedic nuskhon ka ilaaj. GMP certified facility mein banta hai. Koi chemical nahi — sirf seedhe khet se jadibutiyan.

🌿 Nirgundi🌱 Ashwagandha 🫚 Brahmi🌺 Kapoor 🍋 Amla🌸 Gulkand
